title: Jiho Min
text:
16-year-old developer portfolio
    Hi, I'm Jiho Min.
    
      I build useful web apps, data tools, and digital experiences that connect
      technology with school life, sports, finance, and learning.
    
    
      GitHub
      Email
    
  
  
    
    
      
        Focus
        Web apps and data
      
      
        Location
        South Korea / U.S.
      
      
        Current Role
        Student developer
      
    
  



  
    About
    Developer, student, and translator.
  
  
    
      I am a 16-year-old South Korean-American student who enjoys turning ideas
      into practical software. I like building products that are easy to use,
      well organized, and connected to real people around me.
    
    
      My interests include web development, Python apps, financial markets,
      data visualization, and international communication. Outside of coding, I
      contribute as a translator for global websites and keep learning across
      technology, economics, and design.
    
  



  
    Project Portfolio
    Selected work
  
  
    
      
        Web application
        Seocho Middle School Soccer Club Website
        
          A full soccer team platform with team information, match schedules,
          player profiles, and performance statistics. Built as a solo project
          with a focus on real team operations and clear data presentation.
        
      
      
        Python
        Streamlit
        Pandas
        Plotly
      
      
        GitHub Repository
        Live Demo
      
    

    
      
        Learning lab
        Finance and Data Experiments
        
          Small projects and notebooks for understanding markets, analyzing
          data, and practicing how to explain complex information visually.
        
      
      
        Python
        Pandas
        Matplotlib

    Tools I use to build.
